# The Eurozone Debt Crisis (2010–2012)

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IuOSLf5BamM >}}


## What Happened

*Full analysis of the Eurozone Debt Crisis (2010–2012) — including the event narrative — will be published as part of the complete series.*

## The Failures

*Full analysis of the Eurozone Debt Crisis (2010–2012) — including the policy failures — will be published as part of the complete series.*

## The Response

*Full analysis of the Eurozone Debt Crisis (2010–2012) — including the interventions deployed — will be published as part of the complete series.*

## The Legacy

*Full analysis of the Eurozone Debt Crisis (2010–2012) — including the long-run consequences — will be published as part of the complete series.*
